properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If love endured that ancient cross How precious is my Saviour's blood The beauty of heaven wrapped in my shame The image of love upon death's frame

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If having my heart was worth the pain What joy could You see beyond the grave If love found my soul worth dying for

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: How wonderful How glorious My Saviour's scars Victorious My chains are gone My debt is paid From death to life And grace to grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If heaven now owns that vacant tomb How great is the hope that lives in You The passion that tore through hell like a rose The promise that rolled back death and its stone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If freedom is worth the life You raised Where is my sin, where is my shame If love paid it all to have my heart

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: When I see that cross I see freedom When I see that grave I'll see Jesus And from death to life I will sing Your praise In the wonder of Your grace :/ x4 How my soul will sing Your praise In the wonder of Your grace How my soul will sing Your praise

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: When I see that cross I see freedom When I see that grave I'll see Jesus And from death to life I will sing Your praise In the wonder of Your grace :/ How my soul will sing Your praise In the wonder of Your grace How my soul will sing Your praise
